remarks: Enjoy this sun-drenched renovated contemporary split-level home with open floor plan. Featuring a private, fenced in yard, this inviting renovated property offers the perfect blend of style, comfort and convenience, just minutes from town, beaches, shopping, dining, schools, train and all that Westport has to offer.
